text: Standing before this vibrant and futuristic chamber, I am struck by the careful merger of art, technology, and introspection. The glow of purple lights and bold "R+D" lettering marks this as a place of innovation, yet the recorded poetic lines invite me to feel—not just analyze. I feel a gentle tension between curiosity and reflection, drawn to both the unknown possibilities of human-machine connection and the quiet, personal depth of the words. Here, contemplation meets invention, and I feel alive with questions.
